stories.title: core node model + put/get + append-only index + embed-or-fallback
acceptanceCriteria: put(path) registers a copy under the fs root and appends a node {id,path,summary,tags,embedding} to index.jsonl
put(text) writes a new file under the fs root and indexes it
get(node) returns the exact on-disk file content (pointer integrity)
embedding computed via local nomic-embed-text when ollama is up; embedding=None (graceful) when ollama is down — never crashes

stories.title: semantic search with keyword fallback
acceptanceCriteria: search(query) ranks nodes by cosine over embeddings and returns the topically-relevant file as top-1 (3-file seed, by MEANING not insertion order)
when embeddings unavailable, search falls back to keyword/substring match and still returns results
tombstoned nodes are excluded from results

stories.title: graph edges + CRUD tombstone
acceptanceCriteria: link(a,b,relation) appends an edge; neighbors(node) returns linked nodes
rm(node) appends a tombstone and the node stops appearing in search/ls WITHOUT destructively rewriting index.jsonl (append-only DNA #3)

stories.title: tests + demo + CLI + privacy
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test_aios_semantic_fs.py passes (semantic top-1, forced keyword fallback, get integrity, link/neighbors, rm tombstone)
CLI put|search|get|link|ls works; __main__ demo indexes 3 files and shows semantic search
index stores pointer+summary+embedding only; no file content egresses anywhere (local-only)
